text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, to think that my trainer would reward me
with such a veritable feast of desserts. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
They have a limited supply, though, so we should
go before they run out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen's achievements have left a
lasting mark on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've successfully navigated the crucial initial
three years together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, it only just ended, and honestly, the
feeling hasn't had a chance to sink in yet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Two orders of the Stacked Strawberry Afternoon
Tea Set, please!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If these are like the pictures, we're about to
experience three tiers of sublime sweetness!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, just imagining it is making my mouth water
in anticipation. ♪
choice_data_list:
You were holding yourself back before your
races, huh?

You were holding yourself back before your
races, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Urk... You're bringing that up now?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This is supposed to be a time for us to relax and
destress.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Though, now that I think about it, it was thanks to
sweets that you and I first met.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Fortunately, I was able to achieve my goal
without giving up either sweets or racing.
choice_data_list: So you're saying it's all thanks to me?
So you're saying it's all thanks to me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Good grief, someone sure is full of themselves today.

text_block_list.name: Male Viewer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, "Peak Umamusume" is starting! I love this
show!

text_block_list.name: Female Viewer
text_block_list.text:
You really like that segment, huh? You're always
watching it.

text_block_list.name: Male Viewer
text_block_list.text:
It's super intense right now! I mean, in the recent
autumn Tenno Sho—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh... the autumn Tenno Sho?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I wonder if they're airing that interview now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing the words "autumn Tenno Sho" and
"interview" brings back a certain memory.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text: Hello there, Miss McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello. Come to think of it, it's interview day,
isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
If you don't mind, I'd like to ask you some
questions.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I don't mind at all. Please ask whatever you like.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
First of all, congratulations on your successive
wins in the spring and autumn Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Now seems like the perfect time for you to take a
break. What are you going to do first?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm. First, I plan to devour sweets to my
heart's—ahh!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text: Sweets, you say?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: N-no! That's not it! Um... I'm going to train!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text: Oh! Really?!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
You're still aiming high even after reaching your
goal. That's our McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Uh, no... I'm sorry. That was just—

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
The Twinkle Series may be over, but you're
keeping your eyes on the next prize!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Be sure to watch her, everyone! She's going to go
far!

text_block_list.name: Male Viewer
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... McQueen's really something! She said
she's still aiming to achieve more!

text_block_list.name: Female Viewer
text_block_list.text: What, really?! Lemme see!

text_block_list.name: Male Viewer
text_block_list.text:
But what happens if she just keeps getting better?
Won't it get boring?

text_block_list.name: Female Viewer
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, right? She'll end up winning every single
race.

text_block_list.name: Female Viewer
text_block_list.text:
But y'know, being so strong that every race is a
bore is kinda cool in its own way!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wha—That's the footage they decided to air?! I'm so embarrassed...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...But wait, did I hear those people say I'm becoming so strong that I'm boring?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...I see. They wouldn't speak that way if they
weren't convinced I'd win.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but... if that's the case, does that make you
"boring" as well?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I suppose you'd be boring McQueen's boring
trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's just like you to get carried away so
quickly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Still... I like the sound of that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The ultimate pair, so strong that we'll bore you to
sleep! Hehe!
